title: OASG Existence
scope_note: Defended as the battery witness-row OASG existence theorem under explicit arbitrage reachability and controller-fault independence assumptions.

title: Safety Preservation
scope_note: Defended as a one-step true-state postcondition whose tightened margin already absorbs the one-step model-error allowance.

title: ORIUS Core Envelope Derivation
scope_note: Defended as the per-step envelope derivation under the explicit battery assumptions and the narrowed reliability-score interpretation.

title: ORIUS Core Aggregation Corollary
scope_note: Derived corollary that converts the predictable per-step budget into the episode-average envelope.

title: Observation Necessity / No Free Safety
scope_note: Defended as the observation-necessity witness for the fixed-margin quality-ignorant controller class on the battery row with explicit arbitrage reachability.

title: Certificate Expiration Bound
scope_note: Defended as the confidence-aware closed-form battery expiration theorem with explicit delta dependence and first-passage side conditions.

title: Feasible Fallback Existence
scope_note: Defended as a battery-specific piecewise fallback theorem: safe hold on the interior, safe landing near the boundary, and fail-closed infeasibility otherwise.

title: Graceful Degradation Dominance
scope_note: Supporting comparison theorem at the sequence level; the strict absorbing-landing claim is not part of the defended headline core.

title: Typed structural transfer theorem, T11
scope_note: Defended as the forward four-obligation one-step transfer theorem; the converse remains a separate structural failure proposition.

title: T10_T11_ObservationAmbiguitySandwich: Covered Observation-Ambiguity Optimality
scope_note: Supporting optimality corollary under covered observation ambiguity; it does not assert unrestricted global optimality for all physical AI systems.

title: T11_AV_BrakeHold: AV Brake-Hold Runtime Lemma
scope_note: Supporting AV runtime lemma under forward-only T11; bounded to promoted ORIUS replay rows and the longitudinal brake-hold postcondition.

title: T11_HC_FailSafeRelease: Healthcare Fail-Safe Release Runtime Lemma
scope_note: Supporting healthcare runtime lemma under forward-only T11; bounded to promoted MIMIC monitoring rows and the fail-safe alert-release postcondition.

title: T6_AV_FallbackValidity: AV One-Step Fallback Certificate Lemma
scope_note: Supporting AV certificate-validity lemma under T6/T11; degraded full-brake fallback releases are one-step valid only.

title: T6_HC_FallbackValidity: Healthcare One-Step Fallback Certificate Lemma
scope_note: Supporting healthcare certificate-validity lemma under T6/T11; degraded max-alert fallback releases are one-step valid only.

title: T_EQ_Battery_RuntimeArtifactPackage: Battery Equal Artifact Discipline Package
scope_note: Supporting artifact-discipline row; it checks battery theorem, runtime, comparator, ablation, negative-control, utility, and reproducibility evidence without changing the flagship theorem tier.

title: T_EQ_AV_RuntimeArtifactPackage: AV Equal Artifact Discipline Package
scope_note: Supporting artifact-discipline row for the bounded AV replay contract; it does not assert full autonomous-driving field closure.

title: T_EQ_HC_RuntimeArtifactPackage: Healthcare Equal Artifact Discipline Package
scope_note: Supporting artifact-discipline row for the bounded healthcare monitoring contract; it does not assert regulated clinical deployment readiness.

title: T11_Byzantine: Byzantine Trimmed-Mean Bound
scope_note: Supporting bounded Byzantine robustness theorem under the stated trimmed-mean assumptions.

title: T_stale_decay: Stale-Decay Schedule
scope_note: Supporting design-schedule theorem for stale-data degradation handling.

title: T_trajectory_PAC: PAC Trajectory Certificate
scope_note: Defended as the implemented Bonferroni/union-bound trajectory certificate and nothing stronger.
